subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Alí! Hearken unto the call of Him Who hath been wronged. Verily, He maketh mention of thee from the hallowed Spot, and commandeth thee what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی ان استمع ندآء المظلوم انه یذکرک فی البقعه البضاء و یامرک بما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @naming of children; of individuals, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
